description: Use this API to write an extended raw data file from data in the current working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = writerawx(sfile, domains)

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Filename of the extended power flow raw data file. (input).

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Comma separated string of rawx domains to write to sfile. (input; all domains by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
